sections.paragraph:
ἀναγνωρίζω 1 aor. mid. ἀνεγνωρισάμην (γνωρίζω ‘make known’; Pla., Polit. 258a; Herm. Wr. 1, 18; Gen. 45:1) learn to know again, become reacquainted see again ταύτην Hv 1, 1, 1. Be recognized ἀνεγνωρίσθη Ἰωσὴφ τ. ἀδελφοῖς αὐτοῦ Ac 7:13 (Gen 45:1).—DELG s.v. γιγνώσκω 225.

aor. aor. = aorist

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 61
